title: Spontex Multi + Fringe Mop
features: Traditional fringe mop with ultra absorbent fringes.
Sponge centre protects floor from scratching.
Two integrated non scratch scouring strips to remove tough marks and stains.
The telescopic handle extends from 80cm to 140cm to suit all users.
description: Product Description Colourful, efficient and versatile, Spontex Multi + Fringe Mop is ideal for use on all types of floors. The ultra absorbent and resistant fringes are machine washable and last longer than a traditional mop. The mop head has a sponge centre to protect floors from scratching and two integrated non scratch scouring strips to remove those tough marks and stains. Its telescopic handle extends from 80 to 140cm to suit all users and can be packed down for easy, compact storage. For best results use wet, with just water or floor cleaner on all types of hard flooring including tiles, laminate floor, wood and vinyl. To keep it efficient for longer, machine wash up to 40°C without softener or bleach. Textile Composition: 60% Viscose, 40% Polyester. Safety Warning To avoid suffocation please keep the wrapper away from babies and young children.
